capacity_evidence.estimate: A single hidden-state tensor at batch 32, context 131072, hidden 4096 is 32 GiB before QKV, MLP intermediates, KV/cache, and op workspaces. That already exceeds the local single-chip Wormhole-class device used by the functional tests, so this correctness-first single-device stage does not claim the HF-advertised context.

notes: FunctionalDecoder rebuilds RoPE tables at setup and accepts caller-provided RoPE/masks; the default prefill path uses SDPA causal mode and does not build a full causal mask.
This functional-decoder stage validated prefill up to seq_len 64 and decode against the emitted cache length 128; larger-context expansion is deferred to later stages.
The forge emit is a batch-32 single-token decode graph with KV-cache append at cache_position, SDPA decode, and nlp_concat_heads_decode.
